project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: Repeatable Web-console-first OSDCloud/iPXE deployment flow for Windows 11 Pro 25H2 zh-TW.

development.purpose: Edit code, docs, tests, commit, and push.

deployment_clone.purpose: Pull pushed commits and run deployment-facing tests from a production-like clone.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root created or updated only by the normal deployment workflow.

development.summary: Development happens in the copied Codex workspace; deployment-facing tests run only after push and deployment-clone pull.

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

after_development_push_before_tests: confirm deployment clone HEAD equals the pushed development commit
forbidden: Do not use the development workspace as the deployment test clone.
Do not edit code directly in the deployment clone.
Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit C:\OSDCloud.

recent_changes.summary: Documented development/deployment-clone/runtime isolation and began tracking .ai/status.json.
recent_changes.verification: git pull --ff-only origin-github master; inspected development workspace and deployment clone status/remotes; no direct C:\OSDCloud mutation

recent_changes.summary: Pushed the runtime prepare completion check fix to origin-github/master.
recent_changes.verification: git push -u origin-github master; git rev-parse HEAD origin-github/master; git rev-list --left-right --count origin-github/master...HEAD; git status --porcelain -- ':!.ai/status.json'

recent_changes.summary: Committed the runtime prepare completion gate so Web fails the operation when post-restore readiness remains blocked.
recent_changes.verification: node --check tools/osdcloud-console/src/serviceController.js; node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/activeOsImage.test.js tools/osdcloud-console/test/serviceController.test.js tools/osdcloud-console/test/webServer.test.js; git diff --check; npm test; npm run smoke; restarted npm run web after confirming deployment services were stopped

recent_changes.summary: Pushed the runtime prepare log UTF-8 fix to origin-github/master.
recent_changes.verification: git push -u origin-github master; git rev-parse HEAD origin-github/master; git rev-list --left-right --count origin-github/master...HEAD; git status --porcelain -- ':!.ai/status.json'

recent_changes.summary: Fixed runtime prepare log encoding by forcing PowerShell UTF-8 output and streaming UTF-8 decoding in Node.
recent_changes.verification: node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/windows.test.js tools/osdcloud-console/test/runtimeArtifacts.test.js; node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/webUi.test.js tools/osdcloud-console/test/webServer.test.js; npm run smoke; node --check tools/osdcloud-console/src/windows.js; powershell.exe -File tools/Restore-DeploymentArtifacts.ps1 -DryRun -SkipPrerequisiteCheck -SkipOsImageDownload -SkipWinPeBuild; git diff --check
